method: live-browser crawl of sitemap.xml (51 routes); getComputedStyle per page; diffed against app/globals.css @theme; colour findings re-verified with format/alpha-aware parser
headline: Highly token-disciplined site. No rogue fonts, no rogue colours, no off-system buttons. Real issues limited to heading-hierarchy and type-role, plus minor layout drift.

S1_headingSkip_H1toH3_listingPages.fix: promote listing/card titles to <h2>, or add section <h2> above card grids (shared component)

S3_containerWidthDrift./contact/: 512px form container, off container-token scale (narrowest token 760px)

V3_reducedHeadingScale_confirmIntent.recommendation: likely intentional article template; formalise as --text-section-title-article

withdrawnFalsePositives.note: First automated colour pass mis-parsed transparent rgba, color(srgb) floats and oklab tokens as pure black. Re-verified with alpha/format-aware parser: none real.
withdrawnFalsePositives.rogueBlacks: withdrawn (transparent / color(srgb) light grey / bg-ink token)
withdrawnFalsePositives.buttonRadiusDrift: withdrawn (4px & 10px both sanctioned; 0px is the intended skip-link)

clean.palette: all rendered colour resolves to @theme tokens; dark bands use --color-ink
clean.wrapperContract: every page has exactly one <main>, one <footer>, one <h1>
